title: T'surrese
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''T'surrese''' was the native [[Language/Legends|language]] of the [[T'surr (species)|T'surr]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from [[T'surr]].

Most [[Gender/Legends|male]] T'surrs were fluent in both T'surrese and [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], although they were only literate in their own language. Female T'surrs were usually only fluent in T'surrese.

{{Language-stub}}
